title: phaseolus cinnabarinus
intro: Phaseolus cinnabarinus, also known as the scarlet runner bean, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Phaseolus cinnabarinus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
